prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on the Geometric Brownian Motion model. Historical daily logarithmic returns of SPGI over the past 5 years were used to estimate the daily drift (mean: 0.000408) and daily volatility (standard deviation: 0.014168). The point estimate represents the median of the projected log-normal price distribution in 18 days. Confidence intervals are derived using the estimated drift, volatility, and corresponding Z-scores for each confidence level.
